summary: Pre-deployment health check completed for SSNC Speed Networking PWA. All 16 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed on both desktop and mobile viewports. Key features verified: phone-only user login, separate admin/volunteer login pages, photo uploads, pass references with category+subcategory badges, public profile with social icons, live screen with light theme and sponsors, redirect-after-login, admin protected routes.
passed_tests: User login with phone only (no password) - phone 8200663263 works
Admin login at /admin/login with email+password - admin@ssnc.com / admin123 works
Volunteer login page at /volunteer/login loads correctly with phone+password fields
/login page does NOT show Admin tab or Create Account link
User profile page at /user/profile shows Photos section with profile picture + company logo upload areas
User profile save works - Save Profile button present and functional
Pass References page at /user/references shows rounds, clicking a round shows table people with category AND subcategory badges
Pass Ref button stays inside the card and doesn't overflow (verified on mobile 375px)
Public profile at /profile/35eca29c-9ef8-4eea-8fd3-51b0bc23859e shows profile picture, company logo on gradient, 7 social icons with brand SVGs
Public profile footer shows 'Developed by Rapid Express Technologies' as WhatsApp link to wa.me/918200663263
Live Screen at /live authenticates with password ssnc2026, shows light theme (white/gray background)
Live Screen shows header logo, 'DASHBOARD SPONSORS' centered in header
Live Screen shows 2 sponsor boxes below header, then Total References + Timer + Attendance row, then leaderboards
Admin settings at /admin/settings has Dashboard Sponsors section with sponsor_name_1 and sponsor_name_2 inputs
GET /api/public/branding returns sponsor fields (sponsor_name_1, sponsor_name_2, sponsor_logo_1, sponsor_logo_2)
POST /api/user/upload-photo?photo_type=profile_picture works with image file
POST /api/user/upload-photo?photo_type=company_logo works with image file
Redirect after login: visiting /user/references without auth redirects to /login?redirect=/user/references, after login goes back to /user/references
Admin panel protected route: /admin redirects to /admin/login when not authenticated
Mobile viewport (375px) - all pages load correctly, Pass Ref button contained within cards

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all features verified on desktop and mobile)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing test user and event data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pre-deployment health check completed successfully. All auth flows work (user phone-only, admin email+password, volunteer phone+password). Live screen uses light theme with sponsors. Photo upload, public profile with social icons, pass references with subcategory badges all working. Redirect-after-login implemented. Admin routes protected. Mobile responsive design verified at 375px width.
